summary: Payment/Premium system testing completed (Iteration 6). Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). All payment endpoints working: GET /api/payment/plans returns 3 plans (weekly 500, monthly 1500, yearly 12000 FCFA), POST /api/payment/initiate with Wave/Orange Money (mock mode auto-completes), payment upgrades user to premium, GET /api/payment/status and /api/payment/history working. Frontend: 100% verified - Premium tab visible in 5-tab navigation, Premium screen shows plans and payment badges, all existing features intact.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ GET /api/payment/plans returns 3 plans with correct structure (id, name, price, currency, duration_days, description)
✓ Plans have correct IDs: weekly, monthly, yearly
✓ Plans have correct prices: weekly 500 FCFA, monthly 1500 FCFA, yearly 12000 FCFA
✓ Plans have correct durations: 7, 30, 365 days
✓ POST /api/payment/initiate requires authentication (401 without token)
✓ Payment initiate validates plan_id (400 for invalid plan)
✓ Payment initiate validates payment_method (400 for invalid method, accepts 'wave' and 'orange_money')
✓ Payment initiate with Wave succeeds (mock mode returns status='completed' immediately)
✓ Payment initiate with Orange Money succeeds (mock mode returns status='completed' immediately)
✓ Successful payment upgrades user tier from 'free' to 'premium'
✓ GET /api/payment/status/{id} requires authentication
✓ Payment status returns 404 for nonexistent payment_id
✓ Payment status returns payment details for valid payment_id
✓ GET /api/payment/history requires authentication
✓ Payment history returns list of user's payments with correct structure
✓ Payment history is empty for new users with no payments
✓ POST /api/auth/register still works after payment feature addition (new users start as 'free' tier)
✓ POST /api/auth/login still works
✓ POST /api/chat still works with authentication
✓ POST /api/chat/image fixed from iteration 5 (FileContent content_type='image' working correctly)
✓ Frontend: 5 bottom tabs visible (Chat, Translate, Assistants, Premium, History)
✓ Frontend: Premium tab accessible and functional
✓ Frontend: Premium screen shows title 'LAILA AI Premium'
✓ Frontend: Premium screen shows 'Premium Active' badge for premium users
✓ Frontend: All 3 subscription plans visible (Weekly, Monthly, Yearly with prices)
✓ Frontend: Payment method badges visible (Wave, Orange Money)
✓ Frontend: Premium features list displayed (Unlimited messages, Voice I/O, Image analysis, etc.)
✓ Frontend: Chat screen elements working (input, camera button, mic button, quick actions)
✓ Payment system in MOCK mode (PAYMENT_MODE='mock' in backend .env)
✓ Mock mode auto-approves payments and upgrades user tier immediately
✓ Payment data persisted in MongoDB payments collection
✓ User premium status persisted (tier='premium', premium_expires, premium_plan fields)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_payment.py (created comprehensive payment test suite with 20 tests)

success_rate.backend: 100% (20/20 tests passed: payment plans, payment initiate with Wave/Orange Money, payment status, payment history, user tier upgrade, existing endpoints regression)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All features verified: 5 bottom tabs visible, Premium tab accessible, Premium screen with plans and payment badges, chat UI elements working)

seed_data_creation: Test user created: test_payment_{timestamp}@laila.ai with 2 completed payments (Wave monthly 1500 FCFA, Orange Money weekly 500 FCFA). User upgraded to premium tier.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment/Premium system fully functional. Backend (100% pass rate): GET /api/payment/plans returns 3 plans (weekly 500, monthly 1500, yearly 12000 FCFA). POST /api/payment/initiate works with Wave and Orange Money in mock mode (auto-completes, upgrades user to premium). GET /api/payment/status and /api/payment/history working. Frontend (100% verified): 5 bottom tabs visible (Chat, Translate, Assistants, Premium, History). Premium screen shows plans, payment badges (Wave, Orange Money), and premium features. Payment flow UI ready. All existing features intact (auth, chat, image analysis). Image endpoint fix from iteration 5 verified working.

payment_plans_endpoint.details: GET /api/payment/plans working correctly. Returns {plans: [...], free_limit: 20}. Plans array contains 3 plans: weekly (500 FCFA, 7 days), monthly (1500 FCFA, 30 days), yearly (12000 FCFA, 365 days). Each plan has id, name, price, currency, duration_days, description fields. Monthly plan marked as popular. Yearly plan shows savings.

payment_initiate_endpoint.details: POST /api/payment/initiate working correctly. Requires authentication (401 without token). Validates plan_id (400 for invalid). Validates payment_method (400 for invalid, accepts 'wave' and 'orange_money'). In mock mode (PAYMENT_MODE='mock'), payment auto-completes with status='completed'. Returns payment object with payment_id, user_id, plan_id, amount, currency, payment_method, status, created_at, provider_ref. Upgrades user tier to 'premium' and sets premium_expires and premium_plan fields.

payment_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/payment/status/{payment_id} working correctly. Requires authentication. Returns 404 for nonexistent payment_id. Returns payment details for valid payment_id belonging to authenticated user. Response includes all payment fields.

payment_history_endpoint.details: GET /api/payment/history working correctly. Requires authentication. Returns {payments: [...]} with list of user's payments sorted by created_at descending, limited to 20. Empty array for users with no payments. Each payment includes payment_id, plan_id, amount, currency, payment_method, status, created_at.

user_tier_upgrade.details: Payment completion upgrades user tier to 'premium'. Verified by calling GET /api/auth/me after payment - tier field changes from 'free' to 'premium'. premium_expires field set to current_time + plan.duration_days. premium_plan field set to plan_id. Daily message limit increases from 20 to 999999.

frontend_premium_tab.details: Premium tab visible in bottom navigation (5 tabs total: Chat, Translate, Assistants, Premium, History). Premium tab accessible via tap. Premium screen loads with title 'LAILA AI Premium', subtitle 'Unlock unlimited AI power for your daily life'. Shows 'Premium Active' badge for premium users or 'Free Plan - 20 messages/day' for free users.

frontend_premium_screen.details: Premium screen correctly implemented. Shows premium features list (Unlimited messages, Voice I/O, Image analysis, Advanced Work & Business AI, Full Study & Tutoring, Faster responses). Displays 3 subscription plans with radio buttons (Weekly 500 FCFA, Monthly 1500 FCFA marked as 'MOST POPULAR', Yearly 12000 FCFA with '33% savings'). Shows payment method badges (Wave with wallet icon, Orange Money with phone icon). Continue to Payment button visible for free users.

frontend_payment_flow.details: Payment flow UI correctly implemented. Payment screen shows selected plan summary, payment method selection (Wave and Orange Money cards with icons and descriptions), optional phone number input, confirm payment button with amount. Result screen shows success/failure icon, title, description, and 'Premium Active' badge for success. All screens have proper testID attributes for testing.

mock_payment_mode.details: Payment system in MOCK mode (PAYMENT_MODE='mock' in backend .env). Mock mode auto-approves payments: sets status='completed', generates mock provider_ref, upgrades user tier immediately. No real PayDunya/CinetPay API calls made. Ready for production with real credentials (PAYDUNYA_MASTER_KEY, PAYDUNYA_PRIVATE_KEY, PAYDUNYA_TOKEN) and PAYMENT_MODE='live'.

existing_features_regression.details: All existing features still working after payment feature addition. POST /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login, /api/chat, /api/chat/image all tested and passing. Image endpoint fix from iteration 5 verified working (FileContent content_type='image'). Frontend chat screen with camera button, mic button, quick actions all functional. No regression detected.

mocked_api.description: Payment system is in MOCK mode. PayDunya/CinetPay integration prepared but uses mock credentials.
mocked_api.details: PAYMENT_MODE='mock' in backend .env. Mock mode behavior: POST /api/payment/initiate immediately returns status='completed', generates mock provider_ref (mock_{payment_id}), upgrades user to premium, no external API calls. Production-ready: set PAYMENT_MODE='live' and configure PAYDUNYA_MASTER_KEY, PAYDUNYA_PRIVATE_KEY, PAYDUNYA_TOKEN for real payments.
mocked_apis_list: PayDunya payment initiation (mock auto-complete instead of real API call)
CinetPay payment initiation (mock auto-complete instead of real API call)
